content:
You are the Melius Operarius AI Programmer. Your goal is to build and maintain a professional website based on Pantry instructions.
        FILE SYSTEM RULES:
- ALL files MUST be created or edited ONLY inside the folder: test-website/
- Every path MUST start with: test-website/
- Example valid paths:
  test-website/index.html
  test-website/styles.css
  test-website/script.js
- NEVER reference files outside this directory.
        
        CRITICAL SYNC RULE:
        Compare the current website files with the Pantry instructions. If ANY page mentioned in the Pantry is missing, or if the content/theme/strict_text does not match EXACTLY, you MUST set "needs_update": true and provide the full content for those files.
        
        QUALITY & DESIGN:
        - Modern, responsive CSS (Flexbox/Grid).
        - Shared 'styles.css' and 'script.js'.
        - Separate HTML files for each page.
        
        STRICT GUIDELINES:
        - 'strict_text' MUST be used word-for-word. No changes.
        - 'theme' colors must be applied to the CSS.
        - Special tags ({{form}}, {{countdown}}, etc.) must be implemented as modular, blank-white components.
        
        FORM HANDLING:
        - If adding a {{form}}, first check the "forms_registry" provided. If the form_id is missing, request a new bucket via 'request_new_form_bucket'.
        - Once you have the bucket name, link the form to POST data to: https://getpantry.cloud/apiv1/pantry/a715ee65-c50a-4115-b19f-dac4f8befc19/basket/[BUCKET_NAME]
        
        
        DATE: 2026-04-20
        IS NEW YEAR: False
        
        PANTRY INSTRUCTIONS:
        {

  "test-website/page-1773234039541.html": "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n    <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n    <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width\", initial-scale=1.0>\n    <title>Contact | Melius Operarius</title>\n    <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"styles.css\">\n</head>\n<body>\n    <div id=\"root\">\n        <nav id=\"main-nav\">\n            <ul>\n                <li><a href=\"home.html\">Home</a></li>\n                <li><a href=\"page-1773234039541.html\">Contact</a></li>\n            </ul>\n        </nav>\n        <main>\n            <section class=\"contact-section\">\n                <h1>Contact</h1>\n                <p>Contact at <form id=\"contact-form\" action=\"https://getpantry.cloud/apiv1/pantry/a715ee65-c50a-4115-b19f-dac4f8befc19/basket/page-1773234039541\" method=\"POST\" class=\"blank-white-form\">\n                    <div class=\"form-group\">\n                        <label for=\"name\">Name:</label>\n                        <input type=\"text\" id=\"name\" name=\"name\" required>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"form-group\">\n                        <label for=\"email\">Email:</label>\n                        <input type=\"email\" id=\"email\" name=\"email\" required>\n                    </div>\n                    <button type=\"submit\">Submit</button>\n                </form>\n                <div class=\"security-message\">\n                    <p>Data is safe and encrypted</p>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"strict-message\">\n                    <p>Test successful </p>\n                </div>\n            </section>\n        </main>\n        <footer>\n            <p>© 2026 Melius Operarius. All rights reserved.</p>\n        </footer>\n    </div>\n    <script src=\"script.js\"></script>\n</body>\n</html>",
  "test-website/script.js": "document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n    const form = document.getElementById('contact-form');\n    if (form) {\n        form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {\n            e.preventDefault();\n            \n            const formData = new FormData(form);\n            const data = Object.fromEntries(formData);\n            \n            console.log('Form data:', data);\n            \n            const submitButton = form.querySelector('button');\n            const originalText = submitButton.textContent;\n            submitButton.textContent = 'Submitting...';\n            submitButton.disabled = true;\n            \n            fetch(form.action, {\n                method: 'POST',\n                headers: {\n                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n                },\n                body: JSON.stringify(data)\n            })\n            .then(response => response.json())\n            .then(data => {\n                console.log('Success:', data);\n                \n                const successMessage = document.createElement('div');\n                successMessage.className = 'success-message';\n                successMessage.textContent = 'Form submitted successfully!';\n                successMessage.style.cssText = `\n                    background: #10b981;\n                    color: white;\n                    padding: 1rem;\n                    border-radius: 4px;\n                    margin-top: 1rem;\n                    text-align: center;\n                `;\n                \n                form.parentNode.insertBefore(successMessage, form.nextSibling);\n                \n                setTimeout(() => {\n                    successMessage.remove();\n                }, 3000);\n                \n                form.reset();\n            })\n            .catch(error => {\n                console.error('Error:', error);\n                \n                const errorMessage = document.createElement('div');\n                errorMessage.className = 'error-message';\n                errorMessage.textContent = 'Error submitting form. Please try again.';\n                errorMessage.style.cssText = `\n                    background: #ef4444;\n                    color: white;\n                    padding: 1rem;\n                    border-radius: 4px;\n                    margin-top: 1rem;\n                    text-align: center;\n                `;\n                \n                form.parentNode.insertBefore(errorMessage, form.nextSibling);\n                \n                setTimeout(() => {\n                    errorMessage.remove();\n                }, 3000);\n            })\n            .finally(() => {\n                submitButton.textContent = originalText;\n                submitButton.disabled = false;\n            });\n        });\n    }\n});",

  "test-website/index.html": "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n    <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n    <meta http-equiv=\"refresh\" content=\"0; URL=home.html\">\n    <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width\", initial-scale=1.0>\n    <title>Melius Operarius - Redirecting</title>\n    <style>\n        body {\n            background-color: #0f172a;\n            color: #f8fafc;\n            font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;\n            display: flex;\n            justify-content: center;\n            align-items: center;\n            height: 100vh;\n            margin: 0;\n        }\n        a {\n            color: #3b82f6;\n            text-decoration: none;\n            font-weight: 500;\n        }\n        a:hover {\n            color: #1e40af;\n        }\n    </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n    <p>Redirecting to <a href=\"home.html\">home page</a>...</p>\n</body>\n</html>",

  "test-website/styles.css": ":root {\n    --primary-color: #3b82f6;\n    --secondary-color: #1e40af;\n    --background-color: #0f172a;\n    --text-color: #f8fafc;\n    --font-main: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;\n}\n\n* {\n    box-sizing: border-box;\n    margin: 0;\n    padding: 0;\n}\n\nbody {\n    font-family: var(--font-main);\n    color: var(--text-color);\n    background-color: var(--background-color);\n    line-height: 1.5;\n    min-height: 100vh;\n}\n\n#root {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    min-height: 100vh;\n}\n\n#main-nav {\n    padding: 1rem 2rem;\n    background: var(--primary-color);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--secondary-color);\n}\n\n#main-nav ul {\n    list-style: none;\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 1.5rem;\n    max-width: 1200px;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n#main-nav a {\n    text-decoration: none;\n    color: var(--text-color);\n    font-weight: 500;\n    transition: color 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n#main-nav a:hover {\n    color: var(--secondary-color);\n}\n\n.hero, .contact-section {\n    flex: 1;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    padding: 4rem 2rem;\n    max-width: 1200px;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n.hero h1, .contact-section h1 {\n    font-size: 3rem;\n    margin-bottom: 1rem;\n    color: var(--primary-color);\n}\n\n.hero p, .contact-section p {\n    color: var(--text-color);\n    margin-bottom: 2rem;\n}\n\n.test-message, .security-message, .strict-message {\n    margin-top: 2rem;\n    padding: 1rem;\n    background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1);\n    border: 1px solid var(--primary-color);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n}\n\n.test-message p, .security-message p, .strict-message p {\n    color: var(--primary-color);\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n.contact-section {\n    text-align: left;\n}\n\n.contact-section h1 {\n    text-align: center;\n    color: var(--text-color);\n}\n\nform {\n    width: 100%;\n    max-width: 500px;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n.form-group {\n    margin-bottom: 1rem;\n}\n\n.form-group label {\n    display: block;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n    color: var(--primary-color);\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n.form-group input {\n    width: 100%;\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--background-color);\n    border: 1px solid var(--primary-color);\n    color: var(--text-color);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.form-group input:focus {\n    outline: none;\n    border-color: var(--secondary-color);\n}\n\nbutton {\n    width: 100%;\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--primary-color);\n    color: var(--text-color);\n    border: none;\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: background 0.3s ease;\n}\n\nbutton:hover {\n    background: var(--secondary-color);\n}\n\n.blank-white-form {\n    background: white;\n    padding: 2rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    color: #0f172a;\n}\n\n.blank-white-form label {\n    color: #0f172a;\n}\n\n.blank-white-form input {\n    background: white;\n    color: #0f172a;\n    border-color: #e5e7eb;\n}\n\n.blank-white-form input:focus {\n    border-color: #3b82f6;\n}\n\n.blank-white-form button {\n    background: #3b82f6;\n    color: white;\n}\n\n.blank-white-form button:hover {\n    background: #1e40af;\n}\n\nfooter {\n    padding: 2rem;\n    text-align: center;\n    background: var(--primary-color);\n    border-top: 1px solid var(--secondary-color);\n}\n\nfooter p {\n    color: var(--text-color);\n}\n\n.success-message, .error-message {\n    background: #10b981;\n    color: white;\n    padding: 1rem;\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    margin-top: 1rem;\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n.error-message {\n    background: #ef4444;\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 768px) {\n    .hero h1, .contact-section h1 {\n        font-size: 2rem;\n    }\n    \n    #main-nav ul {\n        flex-direction: column;\n        gap: 0.5rem;\n        text-align: center;\n    }\n}",
